docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DONALD G. SAVAGE, RECEIVER AS TO DEFENDANT GOODE, ANDREA RENEE DOES 1 THROUGH 5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

JUDGE WICK C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ONLY PLTF'S COUNSEL WAS PRESENT WHO INDICATED TO THE COURT THAT THE CASE WAS SETTLED AND SUBMITTED A STIP & JUDGMENT FOR THE COURT TO SIGN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOODE, ANDREA RENEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 225 HYDE STREET, APARTMENT #109, SF, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-31-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
